goal: Build a pinwheel palletizer: 8 cubes arranged around a central gap on a 0.45×0.45m pallet. Demonstrates the donut_3x3 pattern in compute_stack_placement (3x3 minus center → 8 positions in ring/pinwheel shape). Same robot + conveyor setup as CP-10 (3x3 grid) but center cell deliberately empty — useful for designs that need a forbidden zone / pivot column / central pillar.
thoughts:
Six pinwheel specifics for CP-11 (extends CP-10 — same pallet + conveyor + cuRobo pattern, only difference is donut vs grid):
1) Pattern 'donut_3x3' yields 8 positions matching grid_3x3 minus the center cell. Center cell at (0, -0.4) is skipped — left empty for forbidden zone or central pillar in real scenarios.
2) compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='donut_3x3', n_items=8, cube_size=0.05, spacing=0.10, anchor='top') returns 8 positions in this order: corners + edges, top-to-bottom + left-to-right WITHIN row.
3) Slot order: 0=(-0.10, -0.50), 1=(0, -0.50), 2=(0.10, -0.50), 3=(-0.10, -0.40), 4=(0.10, -0.40) [SKIPS (0, -0.40) center], 5=(-0.10, -0.30), 6=(0, -0.30), 7=(0.10, -0.30).
4) drop_targets dict has 8 entries — Cube_N → slot N. Same per-cube routing pattern as CP-08/CP-10.
5) Pallet 0.45×0.45m centered at [0, -0.4, 0.775]: bbox xy [-0.225, -0.625] → [0.225, -0.175]. All 8 drop positions within bbox.
6) Industrial usage: pinwheel palletizing places cubes with a deliberate central gap so a packaging machine arm can drop a frozen-peg / lid / fastener through the hole.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# 5m conveyor for 8 cubes at 0.30m spacing
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[5.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 8 cubes
for i, x in enumerate([-2.4, -2.1, -1.8, -1.5, -1.2, -0.9, -0.6, -0.3]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(8)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(8)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Pallet 0.45x0.45x0.05m (same as CP-10)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pallet", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.225, 0.225, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# 8-entry drop_targets dict (donut_3x3 — center cell skipped).
# Positions computed via:
#   compute_stack_placement(target='/World/Pallet', pattern='donut_3x3',
#                            n_items=8, cube_size=0.05, spacing=0.10, anchor='top')
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(8)],
    destination_path="/World/Pallet",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.10, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [ 0.00, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_3": [ 0.10, -0.50, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_4": [-0.10, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_5": [ 0.10, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_6": [-0.10, -0.30, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_7": [ 0.00, -0.30, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_8": [ 0.10, -0.30, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Pallet"],
)
extension_notes: CP-11 differs from CP-10 only in pattern (donut_3x3 vs grid_3x3) and cube count (8 vs 9). Same pallet, same robot, same controller. Industrial value: pinwheel patterns leave a central gap for fasteners, central pegs, or air-flow channels in palletized goods. Future extensions: donut_5x5 (24-cube ring), multi-layer donut + layer_rotation_deg=45 for offset stacking.
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + parent Xform + table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[4].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[5].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[6].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[6].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[6].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[7].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[7].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[7].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}, {{workpieces[6].path}}, {{workpieces[7].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}, {{workpieces[6].path}}, {{workpieces[7].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{primary_destination.position}}, scale={{primary_destination.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}, {{workpieces[6].path}}, {{workpieces[7].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{workpieces[3].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[4].path}}: {{workpieces[4].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[5].path}}: {{workpieces[5].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[6].path}}: {{workpieces[6].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[7].path}}: {{workpieces[7].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
failure_modes: drop_targets dict ordering matters: cube_path → slot mapping is by name, not list-index. If drop_targets keys mismatch source_paths names, cubes go to default DEST_PATH center.
Donut center (0, -0.4) is empty — if a different cube is placed there (e.g. Cube_9 from copy/paste error), it'll collide with fingers during subsequent drops.
Spacing 0.10m means donut diameter = 2*spacing = 0.20m + cube_size = 0.25m. Pallet must be ≥0.25m wide. Used 0.45m — safe.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths + Mode A 3-strike fix)
